description: A physical machine, VM, router, or appliance managed by this homelab. Servers are the deployment targets for services.
title: Server

credential_field.description: Configuration for one credential field stored in 1Password and exposed under runtime.credentials.

mode.description: Whether 1Password may be the source of truth for this field. rw fields create placeholders; ro fields are written from provider-generated values.

type.description: 1Password field type when purpose is not set.

credential_generator.description: Typed credential generator. Scalar generators seed a read-write 1Password field; x509 generates a read-only certificate and private-key pair.

length.description: Byte count for base64/hex; character count for alphanumeric.

common_name.description: Certificate subject common name. Defaults to the server identity name and credential name.

validity_period_hours.description: Certificate validity in hours. Defaults to the global X.509 credential value.

dashboard.description: Homepage server card data. Values are rendered directly into Homepage YAML after template interpolation; `group` and `name` are used to place the card.

credentials.description: Manual fields and typed generated credentials exposed under runtime.credentials.

fields.description: Credential fields keyed by field name.

generated.description: Typed credential generators keyed by credential name.

dashboard.description: Homepage dashboard cards for this server. Null or omitted uses the auto-generated server card; [] renders no cards. Card objects are passed through to Homepage after template interpolation.

data.description: Arbitrary JSON-compatible data exposed to templates as server.data.

features.description: Feature flags that provision resources, credentials, or generated setup artifacts for this server.

beszel.description: Create a Beszel agent service target and install the agent in generated setup artifacts when bootstrap is enabled. Exposes runtime.credentials.{beszel_agent_token, beszel_system_id}.

bootstrap.description: Generate platform-specific bootstrap artifacts for this server. Exposes cloud-init and setup-script outputs for general servers. TrueNAS servers receive a read-write truenas_cd_access_token credential and a custom app output.

cloudflare_acme.description: Create a scoped Cloudflare API token with Zone DNS Edit permissions on the ACME domain. Exposes runtime.credentials.cloudflare_acme_token for DNS-01 challenge clients.

cloudflare_acme_legacy.description: Create a scoped Cloudflare API token with Zone DNS Edit permissions on the internal and external domains. Exposes runtime.credentials.cloudflare_acme_legacy_token for DNS-01 challenge clients that cannot follow ACME CNAME delegation.

cloudflared.description: Create a Cloudflare tunnel and cloudflared service target, and install cloudflared in generated setup artifacts when bootstrap is enabled. Exposes runtime.attributes.cloudflare_tunnel_id and runtime.credentials.{cloudflare_tunnel_read_token, cloudflare_tunnel_token}.

docker.description: Install Docker in generated setup artifacts, render Docker Compose deployments to the Docker repo, and install doco-cd for GitOps deployment. Exposes runtime.credentials.{doco_cd_git_access_token,doco_cd_webhook_secret}.

dozzle.description: Include this server in the central Dozzle remote-agent list. Docker-managed servers receive the agent through the Docker feature; other platforms must provide it separately.

mail.description: Provision credentials for the default SMTP provider, currently Resend. Exposes runtime.attributes.{mail_from_address, mail_host, mail_port, mail_username} and runtime.credentials.mail_password.

monitoring.description: Include this server in generated monitoring configuration. Does not provision resources or expose template variables.

monitoring_alerts.description: Attach generated monitoring alerts to this server when monitoring is enabled. Does not provision resources or expose template variables.

object_storage.description: Provision S3-compatible object storage using the default provider, currently Backblaze B2. Exposes runtime.attributes.{object_storage_access_key_id, object_storage_bucket, object_storage_endpoint} and runtime.credentials.object_storage_secret_access_key.

password.description: Generate a random admin password. Exposes runtime.credentials.password and runtime.credentials.password_hash (bcrypt). Stored in 1Password.

tailscale.description: Generate a Tailscale auth key, create a Tailscale service target, and install Tailscale in generated setup artifacts when bootstrap is enabled. Exposes runtime.credentials.tailscale_auth_key.

zfs.description: Install Sanoid and ZFS administration packages in generated setup artifacts. Does not provision resources or expose template variables.

identity.description: Human-readable identifiers and dashboard metadata for this server.

description.description: One-line description of this server. Defaults to a title derived from its parent, region, and display name.

group.description: Dashboard group. Defaults to the server title and region.

name.description: Short hostname component used to build the server FQDN. For region-prefixed keys (e.g. au-malatang) this is the part after the hyphen (malatang). Must be lowercase alphanumeric or hyphen.

region.description: Two-letter region code (e.g. au, us). Combined with identity.name to form the FQDN: {name}.{region}.{domain}.

title.description: Display name shown in dashboards and 1Password (e.g. 'Malatang').

username.description: Primary admin username for SSH access. Stored in 1Password alongside the generated password.

networking.description: Network addressing and access ports. Public host and IP fields create external DNS records and inherit from the server's parent chain up to two levels. Tailscale addresses are resolved from the tailnet.

mac_address.description: MAC address used to discover the client's fixed IP and local DNS record from UniFi. Empty disables discovery.

management_host.description: Hostname or IP for direct management access (e.g. an Incus API endpoint). Empty disables provider-managed remote connections.

management_port.description: Port appended to management URLs. Empty omits the port suffix.

public_host.description: Public CNAME target (e.g. a dynamic DNS hostname). Creates a CNAME record on the external domain instead of A/AAAA. Inherited from the parent chain up to two levels.

public_ipv4.description: Public IPv4 address. Creates an A record on the external domain. Inherited from the parent chain up to two levels.

public_ipv6.description: Public IPv6 address without a prefix length. Creates an AAAA record on the external domain. Inherited from the parent chain up to two levels.

ssh_port.description: Port for SSH access appended to SSH URLs. Defaults to 22.

parent.description: Key of the parent server (e.g. 'au'). Public host and IP fields inherit through at most two parent levels.

platform.description: Provisioning platform. Controls which OpenTofu resources are created. incus = Incus container/VM; oci = Oracle Cloud instance; truenas = TrueNAS deployment target; unifi = UniFi device; unmanaged = externally managed server.

platform_config.description: Platform-specific configuration. Only the block matching the server's platform is used.

incus.description: Configuration for Incus-managed containers and VMs.

disks.description: Additional disk devices to attach to this instance.

image.description: Incus image to use (e.g. 'ubuntu:24.04'). Null uses the platform default.

nested.description: Enable nested containerisation (security.nesting). Only applies to containers.

networks.description: Network interface devices to attach to this instance.

mac_address.description: Fixed MAC address (hwaddr). Leave unset for a random address.

pci_devices.description: PCI devices to pass through to this instance.

privileged.description: Run as a privileged container (security.privileged). Only applies to containers.

profiles.description: Incus profiles to apply to this instance. Defaults to ['default'].

secureboot.description: Enable Secure Boot (security.secureboot). Only applies to virtual machines.

usb_devices.description: USB devices to pass through to this instance.

mode.description: File mode for the device node (e.g. '0666').

productid.description: USB product ID as a 4-digit hex string (e.g. '1234').

vendorid.description: USB vendor ID as a 4-digit hex string (e.g. '5678').

oci.description: Configuration for Oracle Cloud Infrastructure instances.

assign_public_ip.description: Assign a public IPv4 address to the primary VNIC.

image_id.description: OCI image OCID to use as the boot volume source.

ingress_rules.description: Explicit network security group ingress rules. TCP and UDP rules require a port range; ICMP and ICMPv6 rules require both ports to be null.

name.description: Stable rule identity. Changing it changes the OpenTofu resource address.

source.description: IPv4 or IPv6 source CIDR allowed by this rule.

routing.description: Shared backend configuration and routes exposed through this server.

backend_url.description: Default full origin URL used by Cloudflare Tunnel or Traefik.

routes.description: Routes that inherit the shared backend URL.

host.description: Hostname routed to this server. Must belong to a managed DNS zone.

id.description: Stable route identity. Defaults to the route list index when omitted.

type.description: Functional role of the server. Used for grouping in monitoring (Gatus) and display. appliance = dedicated device; cicd = CI/CD runner; ephemeral = temporary workload; router = network gateway; server = general-purpose machine; vm = virtual machine.
